title: WALLET-DEEP
scope: Deepen the existing tenant wallet + credit-note + payment-allocation + statement subsystem (Phase 30 PAY-ALLOC / Phase 42 PAYMENTS-INTL sequel). Today: WalletTransaction ledger + Lease.wallet_balance cached column (decimal float, mutated only via Lease::creditToWallet/deductFromWallet inside a tx with lockForUpdate); CreditNote lifecycle pending->approved->applied->voided that applies ONLY to a chosen invoice; PaymentAllocationService FIFO over PaymentPlan installments (never touches wallet); StatementService event stream of invoices+payments with running balance (no wallet/credit rows); Currency enum + per-payment/per-invoice currency but WalletTransaction has NO currency column; tenants can VIEW balance but cannot self-apply credit; no per-landlord auto-apply rules; no CreditNotePolicy. Money convention in THIS subsystem is decimal float (predates the cents-integer convention used by Phase 30+) — match it locally. Goals: (1) credit-note workflow admin-issues -> tenant-applies, (2) per-landlord auto-apply rules, (3) statement integration, (4) multi-currency wallet. All work landlord-scoped via TenantScope; tenant self-service gated by lease ownership.

findings.title: WalletService — single service boundary over Lease wallet credit/debit + ledger reads
findings.evidence: Wallet mutation lives as Lease::creditToWallet/deductFromWallet (app/Models/Lease.php:141-209) with the transaction+lockForUpdate+afterCommit invariant duplicated at ~10 call sites (webhooks, BulkPaymentProcessor, ManualPaymentHandler, InvoiceService). There is no service boundary, so new wallet features (credit-note->wallet, tenant self-apply, multi-currency) would re-duplicate the invariant.
findings.remediation: App\Services\Wallet\WalletService: credit(Lease, float $amount, ?string $reason, ?int $paymentId, ?Currency $currency=null), apply(Lease, float $amount, ?string $reason, ?int $invoiceId, ?Currency $currency=null): float (delegates to the existing Lease methods so the tx/lock/afterCommit invariant stays in ONE place — do NOT reimplement locking), balanceFor(Lease, ?Currency=null): float, ledger(Lease, ?Currency=null) query. Wrap callers incrementally is OUT of scope; this cycle only adds the service + routes NEW features through it. Phase76 test: credit then balanceFor reflects it; apply caps at balance; throws if called outside a transaction (invariant preserved).

findings.title: Credit note can be issued straight to the tenant wallet (admin issues -> lands in wallet)
findings.evidence: CreditNote::applyToInvoice (app/Models/CreditNote.php:153-190) is the only terminal apply path — it requires choosing an invoice. The WALLET-DEEP goal 'admin issues credit, tenant applies' has no path for an admin to credit the tenant's wallet so the tenant can later self-apply.
findings.remediation: CreditNoteService::applyToWallet(CreditNote): in one DB::transaction, lockForUpdate the credit note, guard canBeApplied(), WalletService::credit(lease, remaining_amount, reason='Credit note '.credit_number, currency=note currency), set applied_amount += remaining, status=applied, applied_at, link the wallet transaction back to the credit note (add wallet_transactions.credit_note_id nullable FK). New controller action credit-notes.apply-to-wallet (landlord/caretaker, ownsCreditNote). Idempotent: a re-call on an applied note is a no-op (canBeApplied false). Phase76 test: applying an approved note to wallet credits the lease wallet by remaining_amount, flips status to applied, and is idempotent.

findings.title: CreditNotePolicy — replace inline landlord_id aborts with an explicit policy
findings.evidence: CreditNoteController authorizes inline via 'if ($creditNote->landlord_id !== $landlordId) abort(403)' (no app/Policies/CreditNotePolicy.php). Inconsistent with the rest of the app (PaymentPolicy etc.) and easy to forget on the new wallet action.
findings.remediation: App\Policies\CreditNotePolicy: before() super-admin bypass; view/approve/apply/void/applyToWallet require landlord ownership (landlord_id === acting landlord, caretaker via landlord_id); register in AuthServiceProvider. Controller swaps inline aborts for $this->authorize(...). Phase76 test: a second landlord gets 403 on show/apply/apply-to-wallet of the first landlord's note.

findings.title: Per-currency wallet balances (WalletTransaction.currency + lease_wallet_balances table)
findings.evidence: WalletTransaction has no currency column and Lease.wallet_balance is a single scalar — a tenant who overpays a USD invoice and a KES invoice would have both collapsed into one ambiguous balance. Currency enum (KES/USD/EUR/GBP) + per-invoice/per-payment currency already exist (Phase 42).
findings.remediation: Migration: add wallet_transactions.currency (string(3), backfilled to each landlord's PaymentConfiguration default_currency, then NOT NULL). NET-NEW lease_wallet_balances (lease_id FK, landlord_id FK, currency string(3), balance decimal(12,2) default 0, unique(lease_id,currency)). WalletService routes credit/apply through the per-(lease,currency) balance row (lockForUpdate + upsert), writing the currency onto the transaction. Lease.wallet_balance stays the DEFAULT-currency mirror (WalletService syncs it when currency === landlord default) so all existing $lease->wallet_balance reads keep working. balanceFor(lease, currency) reads the row. Default currency resolves from the lease's landlord PaymentConfiguration. Phase76 test: KES and USD credits accumulate on separate rows; default-currency credit also moves Lease.wallet_balance; non-default does not.

findings.title: Same-currency apply guard (no silent cross-currency wallet application)
findings.evidence: There is no FX engine and none is in scope (no rate feed). A USD wallet credit must never be applied to a KES invoice as if 1:1 — that would silently destroy money.
findings.remediation: WalletService::apply derives the target currency from the invoice (Invoice.currency) and deducts ONLY from the matching per-currency balance; a mismatch (no balance in that currency, or explicit cross-currency request) throws a typed CurrencyMismatchException (rendered 422 with a clear message), never a 1:1 apply. Auto-apply + tenant self-apply both honour this. Phase76 test: applying a USD wallet to a KES invoice is rejected; applying KES wallet to a KES invoice succeeds.

findings.title: Currency surfaced on wallet ledger + balances (API + UI)
findings.evidence: Once wallet transactions carry a currency, the tenant/landlord wallet views and the statement must show WHICH currency each movement and balance is in, or the numbers are meaningless.
findings.remediation: WalletService::balancesFor(lease): map currency->balance (only non-zero). Wallet ledger payloads include currency + formatted amount via Currency::fromMinorUnits is N/A (decimal) — format with the Currency symbol/locale. Tenant wallet UI + landlord Tenants/Show wallet panel render per-currency balances; statement rows carry currency. Phase76 test: balancesFor returns only non-zero currency rows with correct sums.

findings.title: Per-landlord wallet auto-apply settings + resolver
findings.evidence: InvoiceService deducts wallet credit at invoice-creation time unconditionally (app/Services/InvoiceService.php:263 deductFromWallet). There is no per-landlord control over whether/how standing wallet credit is applied, and no way to apply credit to invoices that already exist.
findings.remediation: NET-NEW landlord_wallet_settings (landlord_id unique FK, auto_apply_mode enum {off, on_invoice_create, oldest_first_sweep} default on_invoice_create, created/updated). WalletAutoApplyResolver::for(landlordId): override ?? config('wallet.default_auto_apply_mode') with Cache::remember keyed by a version stamp bumped on save (mirror the Phase 72 HoldSettingsResolver pattern). Phase76 test: resolver returns the override when set, the config default otherwise; cache invalidates on save.

findings.title: Invoice-create auto-apply honours the setting + wallet:auto-apply sweep cron
findings.evidence: Auto-apply is hardcoded on at invoice creation; landlords who want manual control can't get it, and a tenant who builds up wallet credit AFTER invoices exist never sees it applied without a manual credit note.
findings.remediation: InvoiceService wallet deduction becomes conditional on WalletAutoApplyResolver mode (off => skip; on_invoice_create => current behaviour but currency-matched via WalletService; oldest_first_sweep => skip at create, handled by the cron). NEW wallet:auto-apply cron (daily, Africa/Nairobi, before invoices age): for landlords in oldest_first_sweep mode, for each lease with wallet credit, apply oldest-unpaid-first same-currency invoices via WalletService until credit or invoices exhausted; idempotent. Phase76 test: off-mode skips deduction at create; sweep-mode applies standing credit to the oldest unpaid invoice; cross-currency invoices skipped.

findings.title: Landlord wallet-settings UI
findings.evidence: No surface for a landlord to choose their auto-apply mode.
findings.remediation: Landlord-only settings page (or section in the existing finance/settings surface) GET + PATCH wallet.settings bound to landlord_wallet_settings via a FormRequest (enum-validated mode), bumping the resolver cache stamp on save. lang wallet.settings.* en/sw/ar. Phase76 test: PATCH persists the mode and the resolver returns it.

findings.title: Tenant self-service: apply own wallet credit to an outstanding invoice
findings.evidence: Tenants can VIEW their balance but the only ways credit reaches an invoice are landlord-issued credit notes or invoice-create auto-apply. The WALLET-DEEP goal 'tenant applies' has no endpoint.
findings.remediation: Tenant-authenticated POST tenant.wallet.apply (invoice_id + amount?) — gate the invoice's lease.tenant_id === auth id (NOT just landlord scope), reject paid/void invoices, in one DB::transaction WalletService::apply(lease, min(amount?? balance, invoice outstanding), invoiceId, currency=invoice currency) honouring the same-currency guard, record the application against the invoice (wallet_applied + status recompute, mirroring CreditNote::applyToInvoice). Throttle. Phase76 test: tenant applies own KES wallet to own unpaid KES invoice (balance drops, invoice outstanding drops); a tenant applying to another tenant's invoice gets 403; cross-currency rejected.

findings.title: Tenant wallet UI — balance(s), ledger, apply action
findings.evidence: No tenant-facing wallet page; balance is only implied inside TenantFinances/Index.
findings.remediation: Pages/TenantFinances/Wallet.vue (or a section): per-currency balance cards, paginated ledger (date/type/amount/currency/reason/balance_after), and an apply form listing the tenant's own outstanding invoices (same-currency only). data-testid='tenant-wallet'. Reachable from the tenant finances nav. Phase76 test (surface): route + Vue token + lang present.

findings.title: lang tenant.wallet.* + nav link
findings.evidence: No wallet lang namespace for the tenant surface.
findings.remediation: lang/{en,sw,ar} tenant.wallet.* (title, balance, ledger columns, apply, currency labels, empty states) with identical key parity; link from the tenant finances surface. Phase76 surface asserts the keys resolve in all three locales.

findings.title: Statement event stream includes wallet movements + credit-note applications
findings.evidence: StatementService::forTenant (app/Services/Tenant/StatementService.php:48-141) merges only invoices + payments into the running-balance stream — wallet credits/debits and credit-note applications are invisible, so the tenant's statement balance can disagree with reality.
findings.remediation: Extend forTenant to merge WalletTransaction rows (credit lowers the amount owed = behaves like a payment in the running balance; debit/apply = behaves like a charge being settled — model carefully so the running balance stays correct) and credit-note application rows, each with a 'kind' discriminator (wallet_credit|wallet_debit|credit_note) and currency. Keep within the existing date window + filters. Pure-PHP merge like today; no N+1. Phase76 test: a wallet credit then a wallet apply appear in the stream in date order and the running balance reconciles; cross-tenant rows never leak.

findings.title: Statement UI + PDF + XLSX render the new rows
findings.evidence: Tenant/Statement.vue + the PDF/XLSX exports only know charge/payment/running_balance columns and the six ALLOWED_COLUMNS.
findings.remediation: Render the new kinds with distinct labels/badges in Tenant/Statement.vue and in resources/views/tenant.statement.blade.php (PDF) + the XlsxExportService sheet; a 'kind' column (or icon) distinguishes invoice/payment/wallet/credit-note. Keep column-preference mechanism working. Phase76 surface asserts the Vue + blade carry the new tokens.

findings.title: Wallet balance summary header on the statement
findings.evidence: The statement has no at-a-glance wallet balance.
findings.remediation: Statement payload includes the tenant's current per-currency wallet balance(s); Tenant/Statement.vue shows a small balance summary above the table. Phase76 surface asserts the payload key + Vue token.

findings.title: Wallet observability — gauges + wallet:rollup cron
findings.evidence: No metrics on wallet credit float or credit-note backlog — finance ops is blind to standing tenant credit.
findings.remediation: wallet:rollup cron (daily, Africa/Nairobi) emits wallet_total_credit_balance{landlord_id,currency} (sum of lease_wallet_balances), credit_notes_pending_count{landlord_id}, wallet_auto_applied_total{landlord_id} (top-50 landlords, bounded). Register in config/alerts.php / alert-thresholds.md if a threshold is warranted (credit_notes_pending sev4). Gauge names follow metrics-naming.md (_count/_total/_balance). Phase76 test: the rollup emits the gauges for a seeded landlord.

findings.title: Phase76WalletDeepSurfaceTest cross-category presence map
findings.evidence: Each category needs a single locked assertion a refactor cannot silently regress.
findings.remediation: Phase76WalletDeepSurfaceTest: WalletService + CreditNotePolicy classes exist; lease_wallet_balances + wallet_transactions.currency + landlord_wallet_settings schema present; routes credit-notes.apply-to-wallet, tenant.wallet.apply, wallet.settings registered; Pages/TenantFinances/Wallet.vue + statement tokens exist; lang tenant.wallet.* + wallet.settings.* parity in all 3 locales; gauges emitted; runbook mentions Phase 76. Phase76 test green.

findings.title: docs/runbooks/wallet.md (NEW) + finance runbook cross-ref
findings.evidence: No runbook documents the wallet/credit/auto-apply/multi-currency model or the incident playbook for stuck credit.
findings.remediation: NEW docs/runbooks/wallet.md: the decimal-float money convention + transaction/lock invariant, per-currency balance model (lease_wallet_balances + Lease.wallet_balance default mirror), credit-note->wallet path, auto-apply modes + sweep cron, tenant self-apply, statement integration, same-currency guard, gauges + incident playbook (e.g. credit_notes_pending spike). Cross-ref from the finance runbook. Phase76 surface asserts the file + Phase 76 mention.
